books.title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
books.author: J.K. Rowling
books.description: A young boy discovers he is a wizard and begins his magical education at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry.

books.title: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
books.author: J.K. Rowling
books.description: Harry's second year at Hogwarts is haunted by a mysterious voice, petrified students, and the legend of the Chamber of Secrets.

books.title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
books.author: J.K. Rowling
books.description: Harry learns a convicted murderer has escaped from Azkaban and is said to be coming for him — but the truth is far more complex.

books.title: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire
books.author: J.K. Rowling
books.description: Harry is mysteriously entered into the deadly Triwizard Tournament, where champions face terrifying magical challenges.

books.title: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix
books.author: J.K. Rowling
books.description: As Voldemort's return is denied by the Ministry of Magic, Harry and his allies form a secret student defence group.

books.title: Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince
books.author: J.K. Rowling
books.description: Dumbledore guides Harry into Voldemort's darkest past as war spreads beyond Hogwarts and terrible sacrifices loom ahead.

books.title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows
books.author: J.K. Rowling
books.description: In the final showdown, Harry, Ron, and Hermione abandon Hogwarts to hunt and destroy Voldemort's Horcruxes once and for all.

books.title: Dragon Masters #1: Rise of the Earth Dragon
books.author: Tracey West
books.description: Young Drake is chosen as a Dragon Master and discovers he has a special bond with Terra, the Earth Dragon.

books.title: Dragon Masters #2: Saving the Sun Dragon
books.author: Tracey West
books.description: Drake and his Dragon Master friends must find a way to save Ana's Sun Dragon, who has mysteriously fallen ill.

books.title: Dragon Masters #3: Secret of the Water Dragon
books.author: Tracey West
books.description: A new Dragon Master arrives at the castle with a Water Dragon, but something seems very wrong with the new boy.

books.title: Dragon Masters #4: Power of the Fire Dragon
books.author: Tracey West
books.description: Drake and Rori's Fire Dragon is acting strange — and a visit to an ancient wizard reveals a dangerous quest ahead.

books.title: Dragon Masters #5: Song of the Poison Dragon
books.author: Tracey West
books.description: A mysterious green dragon arrives, and the Dragon Masters must figure out whether it is friend or foe.

books.title: Dragon Masters #6: Flight of the Moon Dragon
books.author: Tracey West
books.description: The Dragon Masters travel to China to meet Mei and her Moon Dragon, but an evil wizard is after the powerful creature.

books.title: Dragon Masters #7: Search for the Lightning Dragon
books.author: Tracey West
books.description: Drake's Lightning Dragon goes missing and the Dragon Masters must race to find him before the dark wizard does.

books.title: Dragon Masters #8: Roar of the Thunder Dragon
books.author: Tracey West
books.description: The Dragon Masters discover a Thunder Dragon and must stop a dark wizard from using its immense power for evil.

books.title: Dragon Masters #9: Chill of the Ice Dragon
books.author: Tracey West
books.description: A new Dragon Master from the icy north arrives, but a deadly freeze threatens the kingdom.

books.title: Dragon Masters #10: Waking the Rainbow Dragon
books.author: Tracey West
books.description: The Dragon Masters go on a quest to wake the sleeping Rainbow Dragon, whose magic is needed to defeat a new threat.

books.title: The Lion, the Witch and the Wardrobe
books.author: C.S. Lewis
books.description: Four siblings step through a magical wardrobe into Narnia, a land frozen by an evil White Witch, and join the great lion Aslan to break the enchantment.

books.title: The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn
books.author: Mark Twain
books.description: A young boy's journey down the Mississippi River with a runaway slave, exploring freedom and morality.

books.title: Peter Pan
books.author: J.M. Barrie
books.description: The timeless story of the boy who never grows up and his adventures in Neverland.

books.title: The Secret Garden
books.author: Frances Hodgson Burnett
books.description: A lonely orphan discovers a hidden garden and experiences the transformative power of nature and friendship.

books.title: A Little Princess
books.author: Frances Hodgson Burnett
books.description: Sara Crewe, a wealthy girl at a London boarding school, must endure hardship when her father dies and she is left penniless.

books.title: The Wonderful Wizard of Oz
books.author: L. Frank Baum
books.description: Dorothy is swept to the magical land of Oz and embarks on a quest to find her way back home.

books.title: All Time Favourites For Children
books.author: Ruskin Bond
books.description: A collection of evocative stories set in the hills of India by one of the country's most beloved authors.

books.title: The Mystery of the Burnt Cottage
books.author: Enid Blyton
books.description: The Famous Five unravel a baffling mystery surrounding a cottage that has been mysteriously burnt down.

books.title: The Mystery of the Missing Man
books.author: Enid Blyton
books.description: The Famous Five unravel a baffling mystery surrounding a man who has mysteriously vanished.

books.title: Alice's Adventures in Wonderland
books.author: Lewis Carroll
books.description: A young girl falls down a rabbit hole into a whimsical world full of peculiar creatures and nonsensical logic.

books.title: A Christmas Carol
books.author: Charles Dickens
books.description: The miserly Ebenezer Scrooge is visited by three ghosts on Christmas Eve and undergoes a profound moral transformation.

books.title: Atomic Habits
books.author: James Clear
books.description: A practical guide to building good habits and breaking bad ones through small, incremental changes.

books.title: The Psychology of Money
books.author: Morgan Housel
books.description: Timeless lessons on wealth, greed, and happiness through the lens of human psychology.

books.title: How to Talk to Anyone
books.author: Leil Lowndes
books.description: 92 little tricks for big success in relationships, covering conversation, body language, and social skills.

books.title: Made to Stick
books.author: Chip Heath and Dan Heath
books.description: Why some ideas survive and others die — a guide to making messages that are understood and remembered.

books.title: Rich Dad Poor Dad
books.author: Robert T. Kiyosaki
books.description: What the rich teach their kids about money that the poor and middle class do not.

books.title: The Art of Thinking Clearly
books.author: Rolf Dobelli
books.description: A compendium of cognitive biases and logical errors that affect human decision-making.

books.title: How to Get from Where You Are to Where You Want to Be
books.author: Jack Canfield
books.description: 25 principles of success to bridge the gap between your current situation and your dreams.

books.title: How Women Rise
books.author: Sally Helgesen and Marshall Goldsmith
books.description: Identifies 12 habits that hold women back from reaching their goals and how to overcome them.

books.title: The Giant Book of Private Eye Stories
books.author: Bill Pronzini and Martin H. Greenberg (eds.)
books.description: An anthology of classic private detective fiction featuring the genre's most iconic sleuths.

books.title: The Lord of the Rings
books.author: J.R.R. Tolkien
books.description: The complete single-volume edition of the epic quest of Frodo Baggins and the Fellowship to destroy the One Ring and defeat the Dark Lord Sauron.

books.title: Eragon
books.author: Christopher Paolini
books.description: A farm boy discovers a dragon egg and is thrust into a world of magic and danger as the last Dragon Rider.

books.title: Eldest
books.author: Christopher Paolini
books.description: Eragon travels to the elven land of Ellesméra for advanced training as a Dragon Rider, while his cousin Roran fights to save their village.

books.title: Brisingr
books.author: Christopher Paolini
books.description: Eragon and Saphira face ever greater perils as the Varden marches on the Empire and secrets about Eragon's heritage are revealed.

books.title: Inheritance
books.author: Christopher Paolini
books.description: Eragon and Saphira face their ultimate challenge in the final confrontation against the tyrannical King Galbatorix.

books.title: A Gentleman in Moscow
books.author: Amor Towles
books.description: Count Alexander Rostov is sentenced to house arrest in Moscow's grand Metropol Hotel, where he spends three decades witnessing history unfold.

books.title: A Game of Thrones
books.author: George R.R. Martin
books.description: Noble families wage war for control of the Iron Throne of Westeros, while an ancient evil awakens in the frozen north.

books.title: The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo
books.author: Stieg Larsson
books.description: Journalist Mikael Blomkvist and hacker Lisbeth Salander investigate a decades-old disappearance tied to a wealthy Swedish family's dark secrets.

books.title: The Girl Who Played with Fire
books.author: Stieg Larsson
books.description: Lisbeth Salander becomes the prime suspect in a double murder as Blomkvist races to prove her innocence and expose a sinister conspiracy.

books.title: The Girl Who Kicked the Hornet's Nest
books.author: Stieg Larsson
books.description: Recovering in hospital, Lisbeth Salander faces trial while Blomkvist works to uncover the shadowy government section that has persecuted her.

books.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid
books.author: Jeff Kinney
books.description: Greg Heffley starts middle school and records his attempts to survive bullies, impress girls, and become popular — with hilarious results.

books.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Rodrick Rules
books.author: Jeff Kinney
books.description: Greg is back in school with a terrible secret his older brother Rodrick is determined to expose at every opportunity.

books.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Last Straw
books.author: Jeff Kinney
books.description: Greg's dad is fed up with his lazy attitude and threatens to send him to military school — can Greg turn things around?

books.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days
books.author: Jeff Kinney
books.description: It's summer vacation and Greg would love to spend it playing video games — but his family has other, far more embarrassing plans.

books.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Ugly Truth
books.author: Jeff Kinney
books.description: Greg and Rowley's friendship is on the rocks, and Greg navigates the painful reality of growing up whether he likes it or not.

books.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Cabin Fever
books.author: Jeff Kinney
books.description: Greg is in big trouble at school, and then a massive blizzard traps the Heffley family at home together — a recipe for total chaos.

books.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Third Wheel
books.author: Jeff Kinney
books.description: Valentine's Day is coming and Greg desperately wants a date to the school dance, but his master plan keeps backfiring spectacularly.

books.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Hard Luck
books.author: Jeff Kinney
books.description: Rowley has a new girlfriend and Greg is suddenly friendless — so he turns to a Magic 8-Ball for guidance, with predictably awful results.

books.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul
books.author: Jeff Kinney
books.description: The Heffley family sets off on a road trip that quickly spirals into one of the most disastrous vacations in history.

books.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Old School
books.author: Jeff Kinney
books.description: Greg's family unplugs from technology and heads to Hardscrabble Farms, a place with no Wi-Fi, bad food, and even worse company.

books.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Double Down
books.author: Jeff Kinney
books.description: Greg tries to prove he has a great imagination by making a horror movie, but things quickly spin out of his control.

books.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Getaway
books.author: Jeff Kinney
books.description: The Heffleys escape for a holiday resort vacation, but paradise turns out to be anything but relaxing for Greg.

books.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Meltdown
books.author: Jeff Kinney
books.description: A massive snowstorm leads to an all-out snow war between neighbourhood kids, and Greg finds himself right in the middle of it.

books.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Wrecking Ball
books.author: Jeff Kinney
books.description: An unexpected inheritance leads the Heffleys to renovate their home, but every step of the project is an absolute disaster.

books.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Deep End
books.author: Jeff Kinney
books.description: The Heffleys hit the road in a cramped RV for a summer trip, and it does not take long for things to go deeply, hilariously wrong.

books.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Big Shot
books.author: Jeff Kinney
books.description: Greg reluctantly joins the basketball team but discovers that teamwork and sportsmanship are much harder than they look.

books.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Diper Överlöde
books.author: Jeff Kinney
books.description: Rodrick's band gets a chance to make it big and Greg is somehow roped in — leading to one chaotic musical adventure.

books.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: No Brainer
books.author: Jeff Kinney
books.description: When Greg's school faces closure, he hatches a plan to save it — but his ideas only make everything more chaotic and unpredictable.

books.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Hot Mess
books.author: Jeff Kinney
books.description: Summer means a crowded beach house crammed with extended family, secret meatball recipes, and absolutely no personal space for Greg.
